[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A close-up image shows a young person against a solid blue background making a “peace” hand gesture near their face.  

Main Subject:
A person with short dark hair is shown from the shoulders up, facing the camera with their mouth slightly open and tongue visible. Their right hand is raised beside their head with the index and middle fingers extended to form a V shape, while the other fingers are folded inward.  

Setting:
The background is a plain, solid blue color, with no other visible objects or environment details.  

Visual Details:
The camera is very close and angled slightly toward the person’s face, filling most of the frame. Soft lighting creates mild shadows under the chin and around the eyes. The person’s clothing is dark and sleeveless or partially visible around the shoulders, and their skin appears evenly lit. The overall image has a simple, flat background and a centered composition focused on the face and hand gesture.  

Visible Text:
No important visible text detected.  

Practical Summary:
The image is a close-up portrait of a young person making a peace sign with their hand. They look toward the camera with their mouth open and tongue visible against a plain blue background.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):
# Extracted Text

[No visible text found in the screenshot.]

# Structured Version

- [No text present]

# Notes

- The screenshot appears to be a photo with no readable or visible text.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
